feedback: The SIM activation in Indore took over 96 hours which is outrageous in today's digital age. I was without phone service for almost the entire duration causing me to miss important calls and messages. Zero communication about the delay. Modern telecom should make activation instant and this operator delivers.
Standard activtion average speed okay coverage.

I needed an urgent SIM replacement after losing my phone in Trivandrum and the store procssed it within 5 minutes. Same number same plan restored quickly. The efficiency during what was a stressful situation was genuinely appreciated. I appreciate how streamlined the entire setup journey has become now.
Neither impressed nor disappointed with setup.
Activation took 120 hours. Missed important calls.
Fast setup but call quality is poor.
E-SIM provisioning seamless and quick.
Standard port-in experience. Nothing special.
Fast SIM setup and app made it easy.

Standard activation in Mangalore. Submitted documents went through verification and SIM was active in about 12 hours. The process was neither streamlined nor complicated. Just average telecom activation that met basic expectations without exceeding them. Modern telecom should make activation instant and this operator delivers.
E-SIM activated in 10 minutes online.

The SIM activation process has been an absolute nightmare in Coimbatore. I submitted all required documents 120 hours ago and my SIM is still showing no service. Customer support keeps saying it is being processed but nobody can give me a clear timeline.
Fastest SIM activation I have experienced.

The SIM activation was functional but unremarkable in Guwahati. It took about 24 hours from submission to active service which is typical for the industry. No complaints but also nothing to praise specifically about the onboarding. A smooth activation process is critical for first impressions with new users.
SIM activtion took standard time. Okay.
E-SIM activation failed multiple times.
E-SIM keeps showing error during activation.
New SIM not activating despite all documents.

activtion took a frustrating 120 hours but once live the speed of 200 Mbps and coverage in Shimla are both excellent. Worth the painful wait for the quality of service that followed. Modern telecom should make activation instant and this operator delivers.
Worst activation. 48 hours and still dead.

KYC rejected thrice for trivial reasons.

Bulk activtion of five SIMs for my small business team in Guwahati was handled efficiently by the enterprise team. All numbers were live within 30 minutes of document submission. Professional corporate activation procss. The efficiency of activation reflects well on the operator overall.

i helped my elderly prnts get new sims activated in kanpur and the process was surprisingly simple even for them, the store staff were patient and guided them through kyc, both sims were active within 5 minutes, appreciated the smooth experience

Activation delayed 24 hours and once active the speed is terrible at 500 Mbps with poor coverage in Meerut. Bad start followed by bad daily experience. Nothing works well. Modern telecom should make activation instant and this operator delivers.
